channel.title: C-Lang on ijadux2's website
channel.description: Recent content in C-Lang on ijadux2's website

item.title: c
item.description:
sorry

i was bussy for some days and i can’t post any blogs for 5-6 days but from now i will post blogs frequently

c

i am learning zig and c both the same time. yeahh !! dual language same time !!

jokes aside, i am tring to build a custome kernel for myself that works , have great performace and easy to setup

kernel

inspired from linux-zen
